criteria.label: Define knowledge cutoff in plain language.
criteria.example: The model's built-in facts mostly stop around when its training data ended.

criteria.label: Contrast cutoff with pasted context in one example.
criteria.example: Won't know today's headline from memory; will summarize the article if I paste it.

criteria.label: Name two mitigations for post-cutoff facts in an app.
criteria.example: RAG over our docs + web search tool; show 'last updated' timestamps in UI.

criteria.label: Explain why Claude may confabulate recent events instead of saying 'I don't know.'
criteria.example: Next-token prediction favors fluent answers—past cutoff, the model may invent plausible 2025 policy details unless prompted to admit uncertainty or given sources.
